title: Fix circle to only show actual participants with rounds

log.context: Fix circle to only show actual participants with rounds

Done. Here's what was changed in `/mnt/data/hello-world/congress.html`:

**Bug:** The `participantIds` set was built with `.filter(r => r.identity !== 'hiring-manager' && r.response)`, which explicitly excluded Ibrahim from the participant detection. This meant his seat was nulled out. Additionally, since `hiring-manager` is excluded from the `/api/agents` response (and from the session roster snapshot), the `unseated` fallback logic had no way to create an entry for him.

**Fix (two parts):**
